_publications._publicationTitle: Analysis of muscle tissue in vivo using fiber-optic autofluorescence and diffuse reflectance spectroscopy.

_contextSnippet: At 3 weeks, mdx mice are known to be asymptomatic and show no major histological features of dystrophy.
details: 3-week-old mdx mice are asymptomatic and show no major histological features of dystrophy
